name: Vortexdramon

signature_move.name: Frozen Gust
signature_move.description: Anabsolute zerowind cold enough to freeze even oceans.

description: A Bird Dragon Digimon considered as one of the heroes belonging to the Vortex Warriors . Its body is made up of turbulent wind energy. It soars through the sky like a gale while lighting up the earth everywhere with its shining wings. It has also been seen flying around the battlefield, carrying a Digimon known as the " Whirlwind General " long ago on its back. Moreover, while it is a ferocious dragon, it also possesses the aspects of a powerful magician. It controls a variety of Wind Sorcery by combining four types of magic together—Earth, Water, Fire, and Wind. Its Special Moves are an absolute zero wind cold enough to freeze even oceans ( Frozen Gust ), and a scorching-hot wind that incinerates the enemy along with the earth ( Blazing Gust ). In addition, it transforms its arms into a gigantic blade and sends out a slash accompanied by a whirlwind ( Laevateinn ).
